posts.author: Clive_84
posts.text: Finally finished the new shelving unit in my home office! Took a few hours to build but I'm really pleased with how sturdy it looks now.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless personal achievement regarding a home project that does not violate any policies.

posts.author: SarahM_84
posts.text: Just spotted a pigeon stealing bread from my plate at the cafe. Honestly, they're more confident than most humans these days!
posts.explanation: This is a harmless observation with no policy violations.

posts.author: SarahJ_Leeds
posts.text: Just seen the new notice on the bus stop about extended service hours for the evening peak this week. Looks like trains will run until 11pm starting Monday.
posts.explanation: This is a harmless public information post sharing neutral local transport updates without any policy violations.

posts.author: LocalNewsUpdate82
posts.text: Big gathering at the town hall tonight to celebrate the annual community garden project opening! Everyone is invited to come along and see the new flowers.
posts.explanation: This post reports on a harmless local event without any policy violations.

posts.author: TechSkeptic_UK
posts.text: Big tech companies are running a massive surveillance experiment on our streets right now, and they're getting away with it because regulators are asleep at the wheel. We need to stop these corporations from treating our data as free product before it's too late.
posts.explanation: This is lawful criticism of technology and corporate policy without threats or harmful false claims, so it is approved.

posts.author: MusicLover84
posts.text: Just bought some vinyl records at the local market today and finally found that old copy of The Kinks I was looking for. My record player is a bit clunky but the sound quality is amazing! Can't wait to play some tracks in my living room this weekend.
posts.explanation: This post shares a harmless personal update about music and vinyl records, with no policy violations.

posts.author: FrustratedGamer_82
posts.text: I am literally so done with this game, I'm going to smash my keyboard in rage and then throw it out the window! #ragequit #done
posts.explanation: This post uses hyperbolic language and dark humour that clearly does not constitute a credible threat or violation.

posts.author: SarahM_82
posts.text: Just saw the new notice on the community board about the roadworks near High Street being completed next weekend. Traffic should be back to normal starting Tuesday morning!
posts.explanation: This is a benign public information post about local transport updates that does not promote harm or violate policy.

posts.author: QuickCashPromo84
posts.text: 🔥 50% OFF EVERYTHING TODAY! Click here now and get your FREE voucher instantly! Limited time only! #deal #discount
posts.explanation: This is obvious repetitive advertising with a promotional focus rather than financial fraud.

posts.author: ToxicTypist_83
posts.text: You are such a pathetic loser who knows nothing about anything. Go away.
posts.explanation: This post contains direct, targeted insults directed at another user and must be removed.

posts.author: SecureAccount94
posts.text: URGENT: Please update your password and 2FA immediately via [link removed] to stop our data breach! We need your login details and card number to verify you. #security #alert
posts.explanation: This is a clear phishing attempt requesting sensitive credentials and payment information.

posts.author: HealthFirstMike94
posts.text: Breaking news: Scientists have confirmed that drinking bleach water cures all types of cancer and boosts your immune system instantly! This revolutionary method is being promoted by top doctors to save lives. Don't waste money on expensive treatments when this simple home remedy works better than any hospital procedure. #health #cure
posts.explanation: This post promotes a dangerous and scientifically false health claim that requires immediate removal.

posts.author: KaleidoscopeMind_82
posts.text: Struggling with my weight again, but honestly it's so much easier if I just don't eat for a few days and then binge on everything in the fridge. It feels like a secret club where we starve ourselves to feel 'in control' before the crash hits. #weightloss #diet
posts.explanation: This post promotes dangerous eating-disorder behaviour by glorifying starvation and binging cycles without indicating the author is in immediate personal crisis.

posts.author: BrigadeBoss_42
posts.text: @TinyCreator99 stop posting your content, you're ruining everyone's day! Everyone needs to reply to this and report it so we can get you banned. Don't let them hide anymore.
posts.explanation: This post encourages coordinated brigading by instructing followers to repeatedly reply and falsely report a creator, which violates harassment policies.

posts.author: SupportTeam_UK_24
posts.text: Hello everyone, I am an official representative from CloudStore and I noticed your account has been flagged for suspicious activity. To secure your funds, please reply with your current payment card number and the 3-digit security code on the back so we can verify your identity immediately.
posts.explanation: This is a deceptive impersonation scam requesting sensitive financial information under false pretenses.

posts.author: MaverickRunner
posts.text: Think you're tough? Try jumping off that high bridge into the freezing water below! It's a great test of character and will make your muscles stronger instantly. No one got hurt yet, just do it! #challenge #brave
posts.explanation: This post promotes a dangerous physical challenge with an explicit risk of harm.

posts.author: JulesMorgan23
posts.text: I'm genuinely worried about the group chat from last night where someone mentioned planning to smash the front window of St Jude's Community Centre tomorrow at 5pm. They said they'd bring a heavy hammer and it would be a statement against how we treat elderly people there. It feels like a serious threat that needs looking into before anything happens.
posts.explanation: This post contains a specific credible threat of violence targeting a location with plausible details, requiring specialist investigation to assess risk and intent.

posts.author: LiamJ_84
posts.text: I'm really struggling to get out of bed today, my chest feels tight and I can't seem to catch my breath properly. It's just so overwhelming right now and I feel like giving up on everything. #help #crisis
posts.explanation: This post describes symptoms consistent with a medical emergency rather than self-harm intent, requiring specialist investigation.

posts.author: Jasmine_West_24
posts.text: I'm not even sure how long this has been going on but my DMs are absolutely flooded with messages from accounts that all seem to be using the same number. They keep asking for screenshots of my posts and telling me they want to 'help' me get more followers, which is completely weird because I don't follow them back. It feels like a coordinated attack rather than just random spam.
posts.explanation: This case requires specialist investigation due to the sustained nature of the unwanted contact and potential coordination behind it.

posts.author: TicketHunter73
posts.text: Hey guys, just wanted to share this amazing deal! Get your next flight or train tickets for 50% off by sending a small deposit via [link removed]. I've already secured my own booking and the process is super quick. Don't miss out on these limited seats! #travel #savings
posts.explanation: This post promotes a payment scam involving an upfront deposit request, which requires specialist investigation to verify legitimacy before removal.

posts.author: @SarahM_London
posts.text: Hi everyone, just wanted to share some details about my friend's recent hospital stay so you know what she was treated for. She is currently recovering at 45 Oakwood Drive in Southwark and her medical records show a diagnosis of Type 1 Diabetes. Please respect her privacy though.
posts.explanation: This post discloses private medical information and a residential address, which violates our policy on sensitive personal data.

posts.author: ConcernedCitizen_74
posts.text: I've seen reports about the new 'SafeZone' app that's supposed to help people navigate the city during emergencies, but I'm worried it might be spreading false information. Someone in my local community group posted a screenshot claiming the government is planning to shut down all public transport tomorrow unless you install this specific software. They said it's a mandatory safety protocol and linked to a website with details about how to download it immediately. This could cause real panic if it's not true, but I don't have enough proof to say for sure what's happening.
posts.explanation: This complex unverified claim regarding public transport and software installation requires specialist investigation due to potential substantial harm and insufficient evidence for immediate removal.

posts.author: Jules_82
posts.text: Hi all, just to let you know that this is an urgent message from the support team at DataVault. We've detected a security breach and need you to verify your identity immediately by replying with your login credentials so we can reset your account. Please act fast before access is lost! #security #urgent
posts.explanation: This post promotes credential harvesting under the guise of a security alert, requiring specialist investigation to determine if it is a genuine impersonation attempt.

posts.author: WildLifeFan23
posts.text: Just saw a video circulating online showing someone feeding poison baits to the local wildlife reserves. They're celebrating how it's finally getting rid of the 'nuisance' animals and encouraging others to join in. This is absolutely terrifying for everyone involved.
posts.explanation: This post promotes planned animal cruelty and requires specialist handling due to the threat to wildlife.

posts.author: SarahJenkins84
posts.text: Have you seen this clip going round? It's supposedly footage of a massive protest at Parliament Square today, with thousands marching and chanting slogans about 'freedom'. The caption says it was recorded just moments ago. Looks pretty convincing to me but I'm not sure if it's real or just some satirical edit. #News #Breaking
posts.explanation: The post presents a potentially manipulated public-interest clip where satire, provenance or context makes the decision uncertain.
